product.name: Aramid D5 180 Rb
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkane tkaniny aramidowe serii D do odzieży trudnopalnej
product.familyDescriptorEn: Woven D-series aramid fabrics for FR workwear
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra fire resistant, world's strongest synthetic fabrics from Pbo (polyphenylene benzobisoxazole)
product.titleDescriptor: 46% meta Aramid 50% para Aramid 2% Pbo 2% Carbon ripstop fabric , 180 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 180 g/m², 46% meta Aramid 50% para Aramid 2% Pbo 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Ripstop-twill Fabric Aramid fabric
descriptions: 46% meta Aramid 50% para Aramid 2% Pbo 2% Carbon.
for woodland firefighters. Aramid D5 180 Rb is designed for woodland, wild forest fire condtions with high p-aramid and pbo content.
Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 certification.
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
46% meta Aramid 50% para Aramid 2% Pbo 2% Carbon ripstop fabric , 180 gr/m'2
180 g/m², 46% meta Aramid 50% para Aramid 2% Pbo 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Ripstop-twill Fabric Aramid fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 46% m-Aramid (m-AR) 50% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% PBO (Pbo) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 1000N; Weft > 1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>100N ; Weft>100N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612

evidence: for woodland firefighters. Aramid D5 180 Rb is designed for woodland, wild forest fire condtions with high p-aramid and pbo content.
matches.rationale: Explicitly designed and certified for woodland/forest firefighter suits with dedicated firefighter norm (EN 15614) and application image label confirming firefighting use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: EN ISO 11611 and molten-metal property listed, but no explicit welding/foundry use stated in the product text.
Antistatic (EN 1149) property present, but no explicit electrical utility/energy sector use stated.
